name: Leader
descriptionTemplate: Dealt damage of commanded units against land units +X%. When capturing an enemy city, grant "commendation" to friendly units within 3 hexes and yourself, increasing attack of the unit by 15%, lasts for 3 turns

progression.renderedDesc: Dealt damage of commanded units against land units +6%. When capturing an enemy city, grant "commendation" to friendly units within 3 hexes and yourself, increasing attack of the unit by 15%, lasts for 3 turns
progression.renderedDescFr: Dealt dégâts of commanded unités against land unités +6%. When capturing an ennemi city, grant "commendation" to unités alliées dans un rayon de 3 hex and yourself, increasing attaque of the unité de 15%, lasts pendant 3 tours

descriptionTemplateFr: Dealt dégâts of commanded unités against land unités +X%. When capturing an ennemi city, grant "commendation" to unités alliées dans un rayon de 3 hex and yourself, increasing attaque of the unité de 15%, lasts pendant 3 tours
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Leader » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Dealt dégâts of commanded unités against land unités +30%. When capturing an ennemi city, grant "commendation" to unités alliées dans un rayon de 3 hex and yourself, increasing attaque of the unité de 15%, lasts pendant 3 tours ». Signature de carte — impossible à remplacer, définit souvent l'identité tactique du général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Leader" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "Dealt damage of commanded units against land units +30%. When capturing an enemy city, grant "commendation" to friendly units within 3 hexes and yourself, increasing attack of the unit by 15%, lasts for 3 turns". A card signature — cannot be swapped; it often defines the general's tactical identity.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Leader“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „Dealt damage of commanded units against land units +30%. When capturing an enemy city, grant "commendation" to friendly units within 3 hexes and yourself, increasing attack of the unit by 15%, lasts for 3 turns“. Eine Karten-Signatur — nicht austauschbar, prägt oft die taktische Identität des Generals.
